basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially announced the Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Roorkee website. Candidates holding an Intermediate qualification with 3 years of relevant experience are eligible to attend the walkin interview on 20 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and other recruitment details are shared below.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
WalkIn Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Attendant post at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Attendant post at IIT Roorkee is scheduled for 20 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Attendant position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is Intermediate with 03 (Three) years of relevant experience. This ensures candidates have both foundational education and practical skills.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Attendant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 18000 Per Month, plus HRA as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Project Attendant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Attendant post will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee office in Roorkee, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job. The position is offered on a contractual basis for a specific project duration.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Attendant post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Attendant post announced by IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q10. Who can attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates who meet the qualification criteria of Intermediate with 03 years of experience can attend the walk-in interview.
